zh.All Cannings or East Kennett, Wiltshire,: 英國維爾爾哥吉拉 卡寧斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Franklin於1590年出生在英國維爾爾馬爾波洛 聖 彼得 安德 聖 保羅時，她的父親Richard Franklin32歲，母親Jane Masselin25歲。她於1613年2月7日與John Hitchcock在英國維爾爾馬爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年2月7日在英國維爾爾福格萊斯同 聖 彼得享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Franklin于1590年出生在英国維爾爾馬爾波洛 聖 彼得 安德 聖 保羅时，她的父亲Richard Franklin32岁，母亲Jane Masselin25岁。她于1613年2月7日与John Hitchcock在英国維爾爾馬爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年2月7日在英国維爾爾福格萊斯同 聖 彼得享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Franklin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein). In general, he was a gentleman ranked above the main body of minor freeholders but below a knight or a member of the nobility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, such as   Frankel  .

History: The American statesman and scientist Benjamin Franklin (1706–90) was the son of Josiah Franklin, a chandler (dealer in soap and candles), who had emigrated c. 1682 from Ecton, Northamptonshire, to Boston, MA, where his son was born.

variants.name: Frankland
meanings: English: probably a variant of Franklin , with excrescent -d, a status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein) for someone who lived on a piece of land held without obligations of rent or service. Compare Freeland .

variants.name: Frankel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Benzion, Hyman, Leibish, Mayer, Meyer, Nachum, Yitzchok, Ari, Chaim, Dov.
German (mainly Fränkel) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Fränkel): variant of Frankl . Compare Fraenkel .
History: This is one of the old Ashkenazic surnames. In Eastern Europe, it was used by rabbinical families well before the mass adoption of surnames by local Jews at the turn of the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Franklin was born in 1590, in Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, England, her father, Richard Franklin, was 32 and her mother, Jane Masselin, was 25. She married John Hitchcock on 7 February 1613, in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 February 1614, in Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 24.

fr.Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltsh: Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Franklin est née en 1590, à Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Franklin, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Masselin, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Hitchcock le 7 février 1613, à Marlborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1614, à Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltsh: Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Franklin 1590 in Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Franklin 32 und ihre Mutter Jane Masselin 25. Sie hat am 7. Februar 1613 in Marlborough, Wiltshire, England John Hitchcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1614 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, England.

Lei sposato John Hitchcock il 7 febbraio 1613, nel Marlborough, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Franklinが1590年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウ スト ペター アンド スト プアウルで生まれた時，父Richard Franklinは32歳，母Jane Masselinは25歳であった。1613年2月7日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルルボロウでJohn Hitchcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年2月7日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアフウググレストーン スト ペターで24歳で死去した。

ko.Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltsh: 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루그h 스트 피터 앤드 스트 폴
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Franklin(이)가 1590년 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루그h 스트 피터 앤드 스트 폴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Franklin(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Masselin(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1613년 2월 7일 영국 윌츠히르 말를버루그h에서 John Hitchcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 2월 7일 영국 윌츠히르 프글레스톤 스트 피터에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Franklin nasceu em 1590, em Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Franklin, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Masselin, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hitchcock em 7 de fevereiro de 1613, em Marlborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1614, em Fugglestone St Peter, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 24 anos.

ru.Marlborough St Peter and St Paul, Wiltsh: марлбороую ст питир анд ст поул, уилцхир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Franklin родилась в 1590 г. в местности марлбороую ст питир анд ст поул, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Franklin было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Masselin, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hitchcock 7 февраля 1613 г. в местности марлбороую, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 февраля 1614 г. в местности фьуглестоун ст питир, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.
